response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. The audio phonetically matches the 'Colorful' reference in the JSON. 2. The JSON contains the full song lyrics; I am discarding the unused portions as the video only covers specific segments. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration, with precise splits for pauses and dialogue transitions. 4. Dialogue section includes specific context regarding 'Madoka Magica' (Puella Magi Madoka Magica) and their 'Tenka Toitsu' (National Unification) collaboration history.

subtitles.original: 新しい景色を
subtitles.english: A new scenery...

subtitles.original: 照らす
subtitles.english: illuminating...

subtitles.original: だろう
subtitles.english: it will be.

subtitles.original: 巡る
subtitles.english: Turning around...

subtitles.original: 時の中笑って
subtitles.english: laughing within the time,

subtitles.original: 様々な想い持って
subtitles.english: holding various feelings,

subtitles.original: 始めよう またイチから
subtitles.english: let's begin again from scratch.

subtitles.original: 辿り着いた儚い奇跡 壊れないように
subtitles.english: The fleeting miracle we reached, so it won't break...

subtitles.original: 手を伸ばし 繋げば
subtitles.english: I reach out my hand, and if we connect,

subtitles.original: ほら
subtitles.english: Look,

subtitles.original: 君は側で いつまでも...
subtitles.english: you are by my side forever...

subtitles.original: まだ透明な 私たちは
subtitles.english: We, who are still transparent,

subtitles.original: どんな色にでも 染まることが
subtitles.english: can be dyed any color at all,

subtitles.original: 出来るから 夢叶えよう
subtitles.english: so let's make our dreams come true.

subtitles.original: 走って行く先に
subtitles.english: Where I run toward,

subtitles.original: 君はいた
subtitles.english: you were there.

subtitles.original: 触れた
subtitles.english: Touched,

subtitles.original: 心は輝いた
subtitles.english: my heart shone brightly.

subtitles.original: 鮮やかな色になって
subtitles.english: Becoming a vivid color,

subtitles.original: 羽ばたくよ 希望乗せて
subtitles.english: I'll fly away, carrying our hopes.

subtitles.original: 無限に広がる空の下集まった
subtitles.english: Under the infinitely spreading sky, we gathered...

subtitles.original: 願い 守り 行けば
subtitles.english: wishes... protecting them, if we go...

subtitles.original: 君と誓ったあの日の記憶
subtitles.english: the memory of that day I swore with you,

subtitles.original: 今 超えて 過去から
subtitles.english: now beyond, from the past,

subtitles.original: まだ誰も知らない
subtitles.english: to a tomorrow that no one knows yet,

subtitles.original: 明日へと
subtitles.english: to the future.

subtitles.original: はい、というわけでぺこらちゃんに来てもらいました！
subtitles.english: Yes, so Pekora-chan has come to join us!

subtitles.original: 来ましたー！ぺこらちゃん！
subtitles.english: I've come! Pekora-chan!

subtitles.original: 卒業するかーい！
subtitles.english: Are you graduating?!

subtitles.original: ぺこらちゃん、来てくれてありがとう。卒業ライブに。
subtitles.english: Pekora-chan, thank you for coming to my graduation live.

subtitles.original: いやいやシオンちゃん、むしろ呼んでくれてありがとうぺこだけど。
subtitles.english: No no, Shion-chan, actually thank you for inviting me-peko.

subtitles.original: ありがとう。一緒に「カラフル」歌えてめっちゃ嬉しかった。
subtitles.english: Thank you. I was so happy we could sing 'Colorful' together.

subtitles.original: ねえ「カラフル」ね。
subtitles.english: Right, 'Colorful'.

subtitles.original: そう、まどマギの曲じゃん。二人で歌う曲だなと思って。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's a Madoka Magica song. I thought it's a song for two.

subtitles.original: ぺこらちゃんの声に絶対合うと思ったわけよ。
subtitles.english: I thought it would definitely suit Pekora-chan's voice.

subtitles.original: ほうほうほう、エモいし。
subtitles.english: Ho ho ho, and it's emotional.

subtitles.original: そう。だから一緒に歌いたいなと思って。
subtitles.english: Exactly. So I really wanted to sing it together.

subtitles.original: じゃあ二人は魔法少女ってこと？
subtitles.english: So the two of us are magical girls?

subtitles.original: そういうこと！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: 我ら、天下統一打ち放った二人！
subtitles.english: We are the two who unleashed national unification!

subtitles.original: わせつれっしょ。
subtitles.english: Waseteru-sho.

subtitles.original: わせつれっしょあれ魔法少女じゃねえし！
subtitles.english: Waseteru-sho isn't a magical girl thing!

subtitles.original: やめてよ、魔法少女の話してたのに急にさ。
subtitles.english: Stop it, we were talking about magical girls and then suddenly...

subtitles.original: 今急に言ったら覚えてるのかなっていうので。
subtitles.english: I thought if I said it suddenly, I'd see if you remembered.

subtitles.original: そういうことね。
subtitles.english: I see.

subtitles.original: ちゃんといいなよ、天下統一の下り。
subtitles.english: Make sure to say it properly, that national unification routine.

subtitles.original: でもそうだったんだ、そういう選曲だったんだね。
subtitles.english: But I see, so that's why you chose this song.

subtitles.original: ぺこら嬉しかったもん、カラフル好きだったから。
subtitles.english: Pekora was happy, because I liked Colorful.

subtitles.original: まどマギの曲でカラフル歌いたいなっていう。
subtitles.english: I wanted to sing Colorful from Madoka Magica.

subtitles.original: もうなんか途中でぺこらちゃんがまどかに見えてきたもん。
subtitles.english: At some point, I started seeing Pekora-chan as Madoka.

subtitles.original: まじで言ってる？え、待って、まどかかも？
subtitles.english: Are you serious? Wait, maybe I am Madoka?

subtitles.original: え、かわいい。まどかかもって思ってきて。
subtitles.english: Eh, cute. Thinking 'maybe she is Madoka'.

subtitles.original: ってことは暁美ほむら？
subtitles.english: Does that mean you're Akemi Homura?

subtitles.original: はい、なんか見えてきたかも。救いたい。
subtitles.english: Yes, I might be starting to see it. I want to save you.

subtitles.original: ぺこらを救いたい。
subtitles.english: I want to save Pekora.

subtitles.original: ぺこらを救う世界線にしたい。
subtitles.english: I want to make this a world line where I save Pekora.

subtitles.original: シオンは何度も死んでぺこらを救うんだ。
subtitles.english: Shion will die many times to save Pekora.

subtitles.original: まじかよ、なんかむしろ逆じゃないの？
subtitles.english: Seriously? Isn't it actually the opposite?

subtitles.original: シオンを救うぺこらの方がいいんじゃないの？
subtitles.english: Isn't it better to have Pekora saving Shion?

subtitles.original: なんでぺこらを救うシオンになってるの？
subtitles.english: Why is it Shion saving Pekora?

subtitles.original: それおもろすぎるな、まじで。
subtitles.english: That's too funny, seriously.

subtitles.original: え、なんかさ、今まで天下統一活動とかたくさんしてきた。
subtitles.english: Well, we've done a lot of 'national unification' activities together.

subtitles.original: ねえ、その天下統一さ、いつやったと思ってるの？
subtitles.english: Hey, when do you think we did that national unification?

subtitles.original: 天下統一、結構最近。
subtitles.english: National unification was quite recently.

subtitles.original: 最近じゃねえよ！ぺこらたちって初コラボとかもう5、6年前とかじゃん。
subtitles.english: It wasn't recently! Our first collab was like 5 or 6 years ago.

subtitles.original: さっきちょっと話してたけどさ。
subtitles.english: We were just talking about it earlier.

subtitles.original: マリオカート、ありましたね。
subtitles.english: Mario Kart, that happened.
